news.summary: Grounded Lithium Corp. (GLC) has released its financial and operating results for the three and twelve months ending December 31, 2024. The company's performance metrics were disclosed, with the details outlined in the official announcement. Trading under the symbols TSXV: GRD and OTCQB: GRDAF, GLC shared important data regarding its financial health and operational activities during the specified period. This public disclosure showcases the company's growth and achievements in the industry.
news.headline: Grounded Lithium reports 2024 financial & operating results (TSXV: GRD) with President's message.

news.summary: With a background of 25 years in finance and accounting within global publicly-traded firms, Ms. Grossman joins the team at CytoSorbents Corporation (NASDAQ: CTSO) based in Princeton, New Jersey. The company has made an announcement regarding an Inducement Grant under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) on April 17, 2025. This grant showcases CytoSorbents Corporation's commitment to bringing in top talent to drive its success in the market.
news.headline: Melanie Grossman appointed as VP and Controller at CytoSorbents, with 25 years of experience in finance. Company announces inducement grant under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.summary: CIBC Innovation Banking has recently granted a debt financing facility to Vancouver's Traction Complete. This Vancouver-based company offers Revenue Operations Data Management apps aimed at assisting organizations in automating key business processes, enhancing sales efficiency, ensuring data accuracy, and optimizing go-to-market strategies. Established in 2019 following its separation from Traction-on-Demand, Traction Complete focuses on automating various functions.
news.headline: CIBC Innovation Banking gives funding to Traction Complete in Vancouver for Revenue Operations Data Management. Founded in 2019.
Shipping rates from Vietnam to the US are set to rise sharply, according to Bloomberg.

news.summary: A recent report by Validated Insights on the nursing industry in Chicago predicts a significant revenue increase of over 11% annually in nursing education over the next five years. The report highlights the growing importance and demand for nursing professionals, indicating a positive trend in the sector.
news.headline: Validated Insights report projects 11% annual revenue growth in nursing education market over next 5 years.

news.summary: Temple, Georgia - Janus International Group, Inc. (NYSE: JBI), a prominent global provider of innovative access control technologies and building products for self-storage and commercial sectors, disclosed plans to unveil its first quarter financial results for 2025 on Thursday, May 8, 2025. The report will be released before the market opens. Subsequently, a webcast and conference call is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the company's performance. Janus is a key player in the industry and investors are eagerly anticipating their financial update.
news.headline: Janus International Group (NYSE: JBI) to report Q1 2025 results on May 8. Webcast and call at 10:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In March, the average U.S. home that was placed under contract spent 47 days on the market, the lengthiest period for any March since 2019, as indicated by a recent report from Redfin. This is a stark contrast to the peak of the pandemic homebuying rush when homes were selling in less than half that time. This March marked the five-year anniversary since the declaration of the coronavirus pandemic, impacting various housing metrics in the U.S. The report was released by the technology-driven real estate brokerage Redfin, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol RDFN.
news.headline: US homes being sold at slowest pace in 6 years, with a typical home taking 47 days to sell in March, longest since 2019.

news.summary: Veritone has been recognized as "Awardable" by the Chief Digital and Artificial Intelligence Office (CDAIO) within the Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace based in Denver. This achievement signifies Veritone's excellence in the field of artificial intelligence.
news.headline: Veritone's AI-Powered Investigate Solution gets "Awardable" status on DoD's Tradewinds Solutions Marketplace.

news.summary: SIX MINING is a platform in the UK that focuses on integrating low-carbon green energy into cryptocurrency mining. They are working towards compliance and standardization of blockchain infrastructure by collaborating with governments and research institutions. The platform is positioned to become a leader in the future "country + enterprise" cooperation model. With El Salvador potentially exporting volcanic energy and cooperating with platforms like SIX MINING, it could bring in revenue for the country and provide green computing resources for global crypto users. Investors are encouraged to consider the positive policies towards Bitcoin by El Salvador's President Bukele and other politicians, indicating a growing market confidence. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: SIX MINING combines cloud mining with low-carbon energy, aims to collaborate with governments for blockchain standardization.

news.summary: GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) has experienced a remarkable increase in its stock price over the last year, outperforming tech giants like Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA), Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA), and Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT). Shareholders have seen returns of over 154%, propelled by various factors such as the social media influence of trader Keith Gill, also known as "Roaring Kitty," and the company's embrace of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). This surge has left many Wall Street firms behind in the wake of GameStop's unexpected rise to prominence in the investing world.
news.headline: GameStop's stock surged 150% yearly, outperforming tech giants. Its memecoin had a 5X boost. Reach full story on Benzinga.

news.summary: QKS Group has released two reports on the global Network Detection and Response (NDR) market, projecting a valuation of $4.24 billion by 2030. The market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 17.46% from 2025 to 2030. NDR is crucial in combating sophisticated cyber threats targeting east-west traffic and encrypted payloads. NDR platforms offer real-time network visibility, behavioral threat detection, and AI-powered response orchestration, going beyond traditional perimeter defenses. Industries like finance, healthcare, e-commerce, and critical infrastructure are adopting intelligent NDR solutions to detect threats that evade conventional tools. These platforms utilize machine learning, behavioral analytics, and threat intelligence to proactively detect and contain threats across hybrid environments.
news.headline: QKS Group projects $4.24 billion valuation for NDR market by 2030, growing at 17.46% CAGR from 2025 to 2030. Industry leaders can capitalize on the evolving segment.
American Express Q1 2025 Earnings

news.summary: Miami-based company Ryder has successfully obtained elite warehouse certification for BJC HealthCare following the overhaul of the healthcare supply chain model by the third-party logistics provider. This achievement comes after Ryder introduced innovative changes to streamline the traditional approach to the supply chain management of healthcare products.
news.headline: Ryder receives elite warehouse certification for BJC HealthCare after revamping healthcare supply chain.

news.summary: In the second quarter of 2025, Gilead Sciences, in collaboration with a partner, will initiate a Phase 1 study to assess single ascending doses (SAD) and multiple ascending doses (MAD) in healthy volunteers.
news.headline: Nurix's IRAK4 degrader IND cleared by FDA for drug trials with Gilead. Phase 1 study in healthy volunteers to start in Q2 2025.

news.summary: A company based in Vancouver, BC, Eros Resources Corp. (TSXV: ROCK) (OTCQB: EROSF) has revealed plans to consolidate its common shares as per a ten (10) to one (1) basis, leading to a change in its name to Trident Resources Corp. This move, approved by the TSX Venture Exchange, is set to take effect on April 22, 2025.
news.headline: Eros Resources Corp. (TSXV: ROCK) consolidates shares at 10:1 ratio, changes name to Trident Resources Corp. on April 22, 2025.

news.summary: Today, Omni-Lite Industries Canada Inc. (TSXV: OML) revealed that it will be sharing its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, based in Los Angeles, California, made this announcement on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: Omni-Lite Industries sets date for Q4 & fiscal year ending 12/31/2024 results. Los Angeles, CA. April 17, 2025.

news.summary: A recently established group is now offering multi-asset solutions to clients. This group aims to provide a wide range of investment options and services to meet various financial needs. The group's services cover a diverse portfolio of assets, including stocks, bonds, real estate, and commodities. With a focus on diversification and risk management, the group aims to help clients achieve their financial goals. This initiative comes at a time when investors are increasingly seeking diversified investment options to mitigate risk and maximize returns. Clients can benefit from the expertise and experience of the group's team in navigating the complexities of the financial market.
news.headline: Alper Daglioglu joins Brookfield as Head of Investment Solutions Group to offer clients multi-asset solutions.

news.summary: Tilray Brands, Inc. disclosed plans for a Special Meeting set for June 10, 2025, targeting its stockholders. The event, which will be held via live audio webcast on Tilray.com's investor page, signifies the company's standing in the diverse lifestyle and consumer packaged goods sector, particularly in beverage, cannabis, and wellness markets. Tilray, listed on Nasdaq as TLRY and on TSX as TLRY, is a global player in these industries.
news.headline: Tilray Brands plans reverse stock split with special meeting on June 10, 2025; to be accessed via audio webcast.

news.summary: Safe Harbor Financial has entered into a strategic partnership with FundCanna, a top provider of flexible capital solutions for cannabis operators. This collaboration aims to enhance financing opportunities for businesses in the cannabis industry.
news.headline: Safe Harbor Financial partners with FundCanna to provide capital for cannabis operators, enhancing access to funding.

news.summary: A recent deal has been struck between a company and individuals, Bradley L. Radoff and Michael Torok. This agreement will involve key terms related to roles and responsibilities, likely impacting important business strategies. The particulars of this agreement, such as investment amounts and profit-sharing details, are significant moving forward. This news showcases the ongoing developments within the company and hints at potential changes in leadership or decision-making processes. It is evident that this collaboration will shape the future direction of the company in a meaningful way.
news.headline: Atea Pharma appoints Howard H. Berman to board, initiates share repurchase program with Radoff and Torok.

news.summary: Enovis™ Corporation, a medical technology growth company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol ENOV, revealed plans to conduct an investor conference call and live webcast to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 8th, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The company will release its earnings press release earlier on the same day. Shareholders and interested parties can view the presentation and webcast by visiting the "Investors" section of Enovis' official website at www.enovis.com.
news.headline: Enovis Corp to discuss Q1 2025 financial results in conference call on May 8th at 8:30 am ET; webcast at enovis.com.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. This positive trend was reflected in the increase of job creation, with 250,000 new jobs added to the economy last month. Additionally, the stock market saw a boost with the main indexes rising by 2.5% on average. This economic growth is seen as a result of increased consumer spending, which rose by 3% in the last quarter. Analysts predict that if this trend continues, the economy could experience further improvement in the upcoming months.
news.headline: Agios will stream Q1 financial results call on May 1, 2025. Mark your calendars! #Agios #Q1 #financials #conferencecall

news.summary: Tecnoglass, a prominent manufacturer of premium aluminum and vinyl windows and architectural glass for residential and commercial sectors worldwide, disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for Q1 2025 before the market opens on May 8, 2025. A webcast and conference call will be hosted by management on the same day at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the company's results effectively. The event will provide insights into Tecnoglass' performance during the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Tecnoglass to report Q1 2025 results on May 8 at 10 am Eastern Time. Webcast and conference call to be held.

news.summary: On April 17, 2025, Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. (NYSE AMERICAN: CATX), a radiopharmaceutical company focusing on innovative cancer treatments, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 and deliver a business update on May 12, 2025, post-market closure. Interested parties can access the press release on the Company's website at https://perspectivetherapeutics.com/newsroom/press-releases.
news.headline: Perspective Therapeutics (NYSE: CATX) to report Q1 2025 results and business update on May 12, 2025 post market close.

news.summary: In Great Neck, N.Y., on April 17, 2025, Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (NASDAQ: LOAN) revealed a quarterly dividend of $0.115 per share approved by its board of directors. This dividend will be distributed to all shareholders registered by July 8, 2025, and the payment will be processed on July 15, 2025.
news.headline: Manhattan Bridge Capital declares $0.115 quarterly dividend per share; to be paid to shareholders on July 15, 2025.

news.summary: At the 137th Canton Fair in Guangzhou, China, which took place from April 15th to 19th, HIKSEMI had a notable introduction. The company focused on the theme "Innovations Beyond Storage" and presented advanced technologies such as PCIe 5.0. This demonstration highlighted the innovative capabilities that are surpassing conventional storage methods.
news.headline: HIKSEMI reveals GEN5 SSD & storage solutions at 137th Canton Fair, highlighting PCIe 5.0 tech - April 17, 2025.

news.summary: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance, Inc., a commercial mortgage real estate investment trust trading under the ticker symbol REFI, has disclosed plans to report its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 ending on March 31. The company, known as Chicago Atlantic in the market, is set to release the specific figures and details regarding its quarterly results to the public. This news was shared on April 17, 2025.
news.headline: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance (NASDAQ: REFI) sets earnings release for Q1 2025 ending on March 31, 2025.

news.summary: In London on April 17, 2025, cybersecurity company Corero Network Security (AIM: CNS) (OTCQX: DDOSF) revealed a significant collaboration with Advania Iceland, a prominent player in IT services in Northern Europe. This partnership marks a strategic step for both companies to enhance their expertise in combating distributed denial of service (DDoS) attacks. Corero Network Security, experienced in providing DDoS protection, aims to leverage Advania Iceland's extensive IT services to bolster their cybersecurity solutions. This move signifies a significant development in the cybersecurity industry, showcasing a joint effort to strengthen defenses against cyber threats.
news.headline: Advania Iceland partners with Corero Network Security for DDoS protection in critical infrastructure.

news.summary: Houston-based energy company Talen Energy Corporation, listed as TLN on NASDAQ, is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 8, 2025. The report will be issued before the market opens on that day. President and CEO Mac McFarland, along with CFO Terry Nutt, will analyze the company's financial and operational outcomes in an earnings call scheduled for 9:00 a.m. EDT (8:00 a.m. CDT) on May 8, 2025.
news.headline: Talen Energy (NASDAQ: TLN) to announce Q1 2025 financials on May 8, 2025. Earnings call with executives at 9am EDT.

news.summary: Alithya Group inc., a technology company based in Alpharetta, Georgia, announced on April 17, 2025, that they have completed the implementation of Oracle Fusion Cloud Workforce Scheduling for Oklahoma. This implementation is part of a larger project involving Oracle Fusion Cloud Human Capital Management (HCM). Alithya, known for its partnership with Oracle, has successfully integrated this scheduling system as part of the transformation. The company's stock is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ALYA.
news.headline: Alithya implements Oracle Fusion Cloud Workforce Scheduling for Oklahoma State Univ. Medical Center.

news.summary: Atlanta-headquartered First Advantage Corporation, a top player in HR technology, is set to release its Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025. The report will come out before the company’s earnings conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day. First Advantage Corporation operates on the NASDAQ under the symbol FA. Stay tuned for insights into their performance in the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: First Advantage will release Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, followed by an investor conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.

news.summary: In Paris on April 17, 2025, renowned French artist Eugène Riconneaus launched ER Ocean Recherche, a groundbreaking project merging material design, biotechnology, and eco-conscious principles. This endeavor draws inspiration from biomimicry to revolutionize the utilization of the ocean, focusing on transforming a vital marine resource.
news.headline: Artist Eugène Riconneaus launches ER Ocean Recherche, combining material design, biotech, and environmentalism.

news.summary: Located in La Jolla, California, on April 17, 2025, CalciMedica Inc. announced its status as a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company under the ticker CALC on Nasdaq. The company specializes in innovative treatments targeting calcium release-activated calcium (CRAC) channel inhibition for both acute and chronic conditions.
news.headline: CalciMedica to present at medical meetings; develops CRAC channel inhibition therapies. LA JOLLA, Calif., Apr 17, 2025.

news.summary: Anniston, Alabama - Southern States Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: SSBK) disclosed a $0.09 cash dividend per share on its common stock. This announcement made by the Board of Directors for Southern States Bank means shareholders as of May 1, 2025, are eligible for the dividend payout on May 12, 2025. This move signifies the company's commitment to rewarding its shareholders and maintaining a strong financial standing in the market.
news.headline: Southern States Bancshares, Inc. declares $0.09/share quarterly cash dividend, payable on May 12, 2025 to shareholders.

news.summary: Pending approval, EYLEA HD could become the inaugural treatment for retinal vein occlusion (RVO) with a dosing interval of up to every 8 weeks post an initial monthly dosing phase. This would reduce the required injections by half compared to other anti-VEGF therapies currently available.
news.headline: EYLEA HD® Injection 8 mg under FDA Priority Review for Macular Edema & RVO, may allow up to 8-week dosing, reducing injections.

news.summary: The bank is projected to achieve US$290 million in the United States Residential Purchase Program by fiscal year 2025. The net interest margin of the bank has significantly increased for the current quarter. Additionally, the bank has included BMO Nesbitt Burns in its Canadian Deposit Broker Network. Moreover, commitments for CMHC-insured real estate loans are progressing as planned and are expected to hit the $1 billion target.
news.headline: VersaBank's US RPP assets exceed US$70M within 75 days, aiming for US$290M by 2025. Also, expands Canada broker network.

news.summary: Alliant Credit Union Foundation has recently granted $108,000 to Digital Leaders Now in Chicago on April 17, 2025. This funding aims to equip students with AI tools, offer teacher training, and provide career preparation for those venturing into emerging technology fields.
news.headline: Alliant Credit Union Foundation gives $108K grant to Ridgewood High School for AI & digital program development.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 17, 2025, BetMGM LLC, a prominent sports betting and iGaming operator in the U.S., revealed plans to share a business update. BetMGM, a key player in the industry, is co-owned by MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) and Entain plc (LSE: ENT). MGM Resorts and Entain jointly operate BetMGM, which has established a strong presence in the gambling market. Stay tuned for the upcoming business update from BetMGM for further insights into their performance and future endeavors.
news.headline: BetMGM, co-owned by MGM Resorts & Entain, to release 1Q 2025 business update. Leading U.S. sports betting & iGaming operator.

news.summary: A business in St. Petersburg, Florida, on April 17, 2025, revealed significant leadership updates as they expand for future development. Neptune Flood, the leading private flood insurance provider in the U.S., shared key changes as they strengthen their team. This company, known for its specialization in flood insurance, is preparing for growth with these strategic modifications.
news.headline: Neptune Flood promotes Matt Duffy to President, hires Alais Griffin as General Counsel, announces new roles for Tom Wexler and Brad Schulz. Strengthening leadership team for future growth.

news.summary: Two eminent individuals have joined Our Rescue, a global non-governmental organization committed to fighting sex trafficking and child exploitation. The leaders bring extensive experience in homeland security and Fortune 500 global operations. The announcement was made on April 17, 2025, in Minneapolis. This development is expected to enhance the organization's efforts significantly, with their expertise benefiting the cause.
news.headline: Our Rescue appoints 2 new board members with expertise in Homeland Security & Fortune 500 Global Ops to combat sex trafficking.

news.summary: Northstar Clean Technologies Inc., a company listed on the TSXV under the symbol ROOF and OTCQB under the symbol ROOOF, is set to participate in the Planet MicroCap Showcase VEGAS 2025. The event will take place in Calgary, AB on April 17, 2025. Northstar has announced its plan to submit its annual audited financial statements.
news.headline: Northstar Clean Technologies to report 2024 annual results on April 17, 2025, also to attend Planet MicroCap Showcase VEGAS 2025.

news.summary: AUSTIN, TX, April 17, 2025 - Ocho Investments LLC disclosed its ownership of 5.2% of Digimarc Corporation's stock (Nasdaq: DMRC). The company urged shareholders to "WITHHOLD" votes for the CEO and Chair positions and to "VOTE NO" on Say-on-Pay in a recent communication.
news.headline: Ocho urges shareholders to "WITHHOLD" votes on CEO and Chair and "VOTE NO" on Say-on-Pay at Digimarc Corp.

news.summary: In Cupertino, California on April 17, 2025, Boardwalktech Software Corp. (TSXV: BWLK) (OTCQB: BWLKF), a prominent Intelligent Information Platform company, disclosed that CEO and Chairman Andrew Duncan is scheduled to speak at the Planet MicroCap Showcase: VEGAS 2025.
news.headline: Boardwalktech Software CEO Andrew Duncan will present at Planet MicroCap Showcase on April 23, 2025. €TSXV: BWLK, OTCQB: BWLKF.

news.summary: Brightview Senior Living, a company that owns, develops, and operates 47 senior living communities in eight East Coast states, has achieved an exceptional milestone. Over 90% of these communities have been voted as having the "Best" status by residents and their families. This recognition highlights the dedication and commitment of Brightview in providing high-quality living environments for seniors.
news.headline: Brightview Senior Living ranked among the top "Best Senior Living" by US News with over 90% communities at "Best" status. operating in 8 states with 47 communities on East Coast.

news.summary: A major annual event by Wayfair offers discounts of up to 80% off, with fresh deals available every day for consumers looking to enhance their homes. The company, known for home goods, reported this in Boston on April 17, 2025. The event is anticipated to attract a large number of shoppers seeking deals on a wide range of products.
news.headline: Way Day event on April 26-28 offering up to 80% off with new deals every 24 hours to refresh homes.

news.summary: In Palm Springs, California on April 17, 2025, a discussion was held by iHeartRadio host, Dr. Wendy Walsh, and timeshare cancellation expert, Juliet Sussman, Esq., regarding the impact of timeshares on marriages. Dr. Wendy Walsh highlighted that the discussions often resembled conversations with divorce lawyers. This conversation shed light on the potential strains that timeshares can put on relationships, with statistics showing a rising trend in divorces related to timeshare ownership.
news.headline: Attorney Juliet Sussman talks about timeshare cancellation on Dr. Wendy Walsh's iHeartRadio show.

news.summary: Laser Photonics Corporation, a prominent industrial laser systems developer, revealed that its subsidiary Control Micro Systems secured a substantial order from a premier global manufacturing services provider. This significant deal was obtained from a top-tier manufacturer specializing in high-reliability original equipment manufacturing markets. The customer is known for being a trusted partner to OEMs in various demanding sectors. Control Micro Systems, part of LPC, is set to deliver on this significant contract with the global manufacturing services provider.
news.headline: CMS Laser, a subsidiary of Laser Photonics Corporation, secures a major order from a leading manufacturing services provider in high-reliability OEM markets.

news.summary: Expro Group Holdings N.V. will be conducting a conference call on April 30, 2025, to review the first quarter results ending March 31, 2025. The call, scheduled for 10:00 a.m. Central Time (11:00 a.m. Eastern Time), will provide insights into the company's performance. Before the market opens on the same day, a press release containing the results will be made available. Additionally, the investor relations section will host the press release and presentation slides for further reference. Expro Group Holdings N.V. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol XPRO.
news.headline: Expro Group Holdings N.V. to release first quarter 2025 earnings, conference call on April 30 at 10:00 a.m. Central Time.

news.summary: In Denver, Palantir Technologies Inc. shared that Anthropic plans to utilize their FedStart program to introduce Anthropic’s Claude application to government agencies meeting FedRAMP High and DoD Impact Level 5 (IL5) security criteria. Claude for Enterprise by Anthropic is tailored for secure AI support for various teams aiding deep work. Palantir’s FedStart aims to assist startups like Anthropic in navigating the complexities of working with government bodies, ensuring compliance with stringent security protocols.
news.headline: Anthropic partners with Palantir to bring Claude app to government sector at FedRAMP High and DoD IL5 standards.
